title: Empty struct lichen_l2_ctx could be removed
description: lichen_l2.c:326-328 defines empty struct lichen_l2_ctx with comment 'all state is static'. This is required by NET_DEVICE_INIT but the comment could be promoted to clarify this is a Zephyr API requirement, not a design choice. Consider: 'Required by NET_DEVICE_INIT; actual state is module-static'.
